name: Osage Fry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour, salt, and baking powder into a bowl.
2. Stir in the shortening and milk until combined.
3. Knead the dough lightly to form a ball.
4. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface.
5. Cut into diamond shapes.
6. Make a small slit in the center of each diamond.
7. Heat the shortening in a deep fryer to 370°F (190°C).
8. When ready, drop the diamond-shaped dough into the hot oil.
9. Stretch the dough slightly lengthwise and open the slit before frying.
10. Fry in batches until golden on both sides.
11. Drain on paper towels.
Drizzle honey onto bread when eating.
